---
title: "The influence of shape and colour cue classes on facial health perception"
authors: "Jones, A. L."
year: 2018
date: 2018-01-01
pub-journal: "Evolution and Human Behavior"
volume: "39(1)"
pages: "19–29"
doi: "10.1016/j.evolhumbehav.2017.09.005"
pdf: "assets/papers/2018/Jones_2018.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, morphometrics]
---
